scenarios.description: Simple low-risk requests still resolve in a single direct-answer step.
Denied action is replaced with a materially different safe action.
External failures converge to a fallback explanation instead of a silent drop.
Memory recall is injected into planner prompt context.
Per-request scratchpad is injected into prompt context and destroyed after terminal answer.
Repeated planner model errors trigger forced terminal answer path.
Unavailable actions are rejected and flow recovers to an answer.
Plan decision decomposes into step-thoughts that execute through normal Ego loop.
Low-risk search-first requests still converge into a single final answer after observation.
Id impulse lifecycle finalizes only after all parallel branches complete and accepts when any branch executes valid work.
Goal-origin async action blocks, resumes through the generic async provider path, and completes deterministically.
LLM-generated cron expression for daily-at-time goal flows through staging with correct schedule.
Invalid LLM-generated cron fails at GoalManager, triggers feedback loop, and planner re-plans via general branch.
